But why?
Your last patch looks correct to me.
And this patch contains chunk for patching plugins/router_uwsgi/router_uwsgi.c.
So patch-casting.diff should be kept, as I understand. :)

> 
> Also, files/patch-pyutils.c is added to help building with clang. See
> attached.
